name: Anthropic
interviewFormat: Multiple rounds: technical screen (ML + systems), research presentation (research roles), system design, safety/ethics discussion, behavioral
questionPatterns: how does Constitutional AI work and why is it important
explain RLHF and its limitations for alignment
design a system for serving large language models at scale
what safety considerations would you apply to a new AI feature
describe a time you identified and communicated a risk that others overlooked
